## The problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected? Why does it matter? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How might this work? Be as concrete as you can. Sketches, examples, or pseudo-code are welcome. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about, and why this one seems best. -->

## Who benefits

<!-- Merchants? Developers? Agencies? A specific kind of business or use case? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links to similar features in other systems, related issues or discussions, mockups, or anything else that helps. -->

<!-- For larger features, please consider opening a discussion first to talk through the idea before opening this issue. -->
